About Me

Hi! I'm Liwani Mercy España, 23 years old, currently a 3rd year Bachelor of Science in Information Systems (BSIS) student at Caraga State University. I am from San Vicente, Butuan City.

I enjoy creating visual content — whether it's editing videos or designing graphics. I love telling stories through visuals and I always make sure my outputs are creative and meaningful.

Outside of school, I spend my time improving my design and editing skills, exploring new tools, and working on personal creative projects.

Skills
